name: Gingerbread Cut-Outs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter; add sugar gradually.
2. Beat in egg, molasses, and vinegar.
3. Blend in sifted dry ingredients. Chill.
4. Roll dough to a thickness of 1/8 to 1/4 inch on a floured surface and cut into desired shapes.
5. Place the cutouts on greased cookie sheets.
6. Decorate with icing before baking or frost after baking when cool.
6. Bake at 375°F for 5 to 15 minutes, depending on size and thickness of cookies.
7. Frosting: Beat egg whites until they form soft peaks. Add sugar gradually, beating until dissolved. Add corn syrup and beat 1 minute. Divide into small portions and color with food coloring as desired. Add water if a thinner consistency is needed. Keep covered when not in use.
